summary: Iteration 15: Multi-applicant detection, Deposit field, and Screenshot handling - All tests PASSED. Backend APIs updated to support deposit field in cases. Frontend verified with Import from Screenshots buttons and Deposit fields in both Cases and CaseDetail pages.

issues: Minor chart sizing warning in console (width/height -1) - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Added deposit field to CaseCreate and CaseResponse models
seed_data_creation: Test images generated programmatically with PIL for backend testing (not persisted). Test case created with deposit field.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-applicant detection, deposit field, and screenshot handling all working. Backend /api/extract/client returns {applicants: [...]} format. CurrencyInput component created at /app/frontend/src/components/CurrencyInput.js. Deposit field added to CaseCreate and CaseResponse models in server.py.

2_single_person_returns_array.details: Single person extraction returns applicants array with 1 object

3_multi_person_detection.details: Multi-person images return multiple applicants in array

4_extract_case_deposit_field.details: POST /api/extract/case returns deposit and deposit_source fields

5_create_case_with_deposit.details: POST /api/cases accepts and stores deposit field (fixed missing field in CaseCreate model)

7_cases_page_deposit_field.details: Deposit (£) field with CurrencyInput (data-testid='case-deposit') present in New Case form next to Deposit Source

8_case_detail_edit_deposit.details: CaseDetail edit mode has Deposit (£) CurrencyInput field (data-testid='case-detail-deposit') and Deposit Source field

9_case_detail_display_deposit.details: CaseDetail read-only view displays Deposit with currency format (e.g., £55,000) and Deposit Source

10_clients_import_screenshots_btn.details: Import from Screenshots button (data-testid='import-screenshots-btn') present in New Client form

11_cases_import_screenshots_btn.details: Import from Screenshots button present in New Case form

12_screenshots_not_stored.details: Screenshots processed in-memory only, never stored to disk or database

13_auth_requirements.details: Both extract endpoints require authentication (return 401 without token)

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent: Added missing deposit field to CaseCreate model (line 190) in server.py
Added missing deposit and deposit_source fields to CaseResponse model (lines 247-248) in server.py
Created missing CurrencyInput component at /app/frontend/src/components/CurrencyInput.js that was imported by CaseDetail.js
